title: Invisibility Aggro Fix
description: Simple mod that ensures hostile mobs can’t detect or attack you while under the invisibility effect, fully restoring true stealth gameplay!
body:
Invisibility Armor Fix!

Want true stealth in Minecraft? This mod effectively fixes invisibility so mobs can’t detect or aggro you.




Ever wondered why hostile mobs in Minecraft still run straight at you even though you’re invisible? Invisibility Aggro Fix puts an end to that nonsense by making invisibility work the way it should - mobs won’t see you, won’t chase you, and definitely won’t attack you while the invisibility effect is active.

Perfect for sneaky adventures, stealth builds, or just messing around without being interrupted by creepers and skeletons. Simple, lightweight, and fully compatible with your favorite modpacks!

If you wish to use this in a modpack, feel free to do so!
